typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-tight

surface_strategies.cards: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: bg-white text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors
surface_strategies.buttons_secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

Hero.layout: Min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center items-center text-center relative overflow-hidden
Hero.visuals: Subtle radial gradient in background. Large H1. Two CTAs (Apply, View Proof). Include a dark abstract texture in the background with opacity-20.

Logo_Marquee.styling: Logos must be grayscale / low opacity (opacity-50) and turn full color on hover. Huge gap between logos (gap-24).

Case_Study.left_col: Storytelling text. Use the 'overline' style for 'FLAGSHIP CASE STUDY'. High contrast text.
Case_Study.right_col: Overlapping collage of real screenshots. Use framer-motion to slightly tilt and float the images. Wrap screenshots in a subtle glass border so they look like premium physical polaroids or framed digital assets.

Proof_Masonry_Wall.interaction: Hover on screenshot card scales up the image slightly, reveals a category tag (e.g., 'Twitter', 'PR', 'On-Chain'). Clicking opens a lightbox (Dialog component).
Proof_Masonry_Wall.card_style: break-inside-avoid rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-white/10 group relative

Value_Metrics.layout: Bento Grid (Control Room Mode). 3 or 4 asymmetric cards.
Value_Metrics.content: Focus on numerical outcomes. Huge numbers (text-5xl font-mono) paired with real evidence context.

Process_Flow.visuals: Use the 'Tracing Beam' effect from E1 rules: A thin vertical glowing line connecting the 6 steps.

Who_We_Work_With.layout: Grid of dark, moody lifestyle images (cafes, startups, events) with text overlays.
Who_We_Work_With.styling: Images must have bg-black/50 overlay to ensure text is perfectly readable. Text aligned bottom-left.

Apply_Form.components: Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea. Dark mode styling (bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800). Submit button uses primary button style.

real_evidence_screenshots.description: WalletConnect Pay now LIVE at 94° Coffee
Solana X repost - WalletConnect Pay live on Solana

background_textures.description: Abstract black background with wavy lines

background_textures.placement: Footer or Apply Form Background (opacity-10 to opacity-20)

lifestyle_images.placement: Who We Work With Grid - Background Image

animation_guidelines.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. It makes the heavy images and masonry wall feel premium.
animation_guidelines.reveal: Use framer-motion for staggering text reveals on scroll (initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}).
animation_guidelines.hover: All cards should have a subtle upward shift (-translate-y-1) and an increased border glow (border-white/20) on hover.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over images has sufficient contrast. Use text-shadow or bg-black/50 overlay gradients.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All key elements MUST use data-testid. Buttons, forms, masonry images, and case study links must be testable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Setup the dark theme globally in Tailwind config.

Do NOT use 'Inter' or 'Space Grotesk' fonts. Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Satoshi' via Fontsource or Google Fonts (or similar equivalents like 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' if Cabinet Grotesk is unavailable).
Use the specific exact image URLs provided in the media object. Do NOT use placeholders.
The Case Study must feel like a high-stakes, real-world narrative. Put the social stats (198K views) in huge typography next to the screenshots.
Masonry layout can be achieved via CSS columns (columns-1 sm:columns-2 lg:columns-3) for simplicity and performance. Add 'break-inside-avoid' to children.
